title: The Human Spider
description: 🕷️ The Human Spider is a nightmare creature stitched together from pieces of human flesh and bone.
body:
🕷️ The Human Spider is a nightmare creature stitched together from pieces of human flesh and bone.
You might encounter it deep in the caves or wandering the dark nights…
But don’t… look… at it.

👁️ If you dare to make eye contact, it will invade your mind:
— 🎭 Hallucinations.
— 💀 A horrifying jumpscare.
— 😵 A chilling image burned into your vision.




And worse?
🏃 It’s extremely fast, faster than anything you’ve seen before.
❌ You can’t run.
⚔️ You can only fight.

Good luck… if you can even swing your sword before it’s too late…


📌 Requirements :
🧪 Requires: [✨ GeckoLib ✨]
🎮 Version: Minecraft 1.20.1
